gui.friends.empty_nickname: Enter a valid profile name before sending a friend request

gui.friends.empty_state: Friends you add will be listed here.

gui.friends.error.connection_issue: Friends List is not working right now.

Check your internet connection and try again.
gui.friends.error.failed.message: Unable to send your friend request right now
gui.friends.error.forbidden.message: Failed to perform this friend action. It may be due to the account's privacy settings.

gui.friends.error.generic: Something's wrong — with this feature, not your friends!

Try again later.
gui.friends.error.rateLimited.message: You're performing Friends List actions too quickly. Please wait a moment and try again.

gui.friends.error.temporary_unavailable: Friends List is not working right now.

Try again later.
gui.friends.error.unavailable.message: The Friends List service is currently unavailable. Please check your connection and try again later.
gui.friends.error.upgrade_needed: Update the game to access your Friends List.
gui.friends.error.user_may_lack_active_profile: There is no player with this profile name

gui.friends.multiplayer.invite_accept: Accept invite to join world
gui.friends.multiplayer.invite_reject: Reject invite to join world
gui.friends.my_profile_name.narration: Copy profile name %s to clipboard
gui.friends.narration.button.accept: Press enter to accept friend request from %s
gui.friends.narration.button.cancel_request: Press enter to cancel friend request to %s
gui.friends.narration.button.decline: Press enter to decline friend request from %s
gui.friends.narration.button.unfriend: Press enter to remove %s from Friends List
gui.friends.toast.friend_invited.message: %s has been invited to join your world.
gui.friends.toast.friend_removed.message: %s has been removed from your friends list
gui.friends.toast.generic_error: An unexpected error occurred while updating your Friends List. Please try again later.
gui.friends.toast.host_invite_expired.message: Invitation to %s to join this world has expired.
gui.friends.toast.invite_from_friend.message: %s invited you to join their world. Open the friends list by pressing "%s" to join
gui.friends.toast.join_invite_expired.message: Invitation to join %s's world has expired.
gui.friends.toast.join_request.message: %s has requested to join your world. Open the friends list by pressing "%s" or access it through the game menu.
gui.friends.toast.request_to_join_friend.message: Request to join world has been sent to %s
gui.privacy_link.message: Open this link to manage your privacy and online safety settings.

gui.privacy_link.title: Changes to Xbox settings may take some time to apply.

If they don't update, restart the game.
menu.multiplayerOptions.network.lan.tooltip: Players on the same network can join.
menu.multiplayerOptions.publish.started.lan: This world is now open to LAN. The port number is %s
menu.multiplayerOptions.publish.started.online: This world is now open to multiplayer. The port number is %s
menu.multiplayerOptions.publish.stopped: This world is no longer open to multiplayer
menu.playerReporting.no_players: There are no players to report in this world
options.allowFriendRequests.tooltip: Allow other players to send you friend requests

options.friendsList.confirm.message: The Friends List controls who you can chat with when "Can communicate outside Xbox" is set to "Friends".

Manage this setting on your Microsoft account.

When Friends List is ON, other players can send you friend requests. You can turn OFF friend invitations or the Friends List at any time.
options.restartRequired: Some of your changes require a game restart to be applied.
options.sharePresence.all.tooltip: Presence is shared with your friends. Appearing as online and sharing what you are doing.
options.sharePresence.limited.tooltip: Sharing limited presence. Appearing as online, but not sharing what you are doing. You can still invite friends to your game.
options.sharePresence.none.tooltip: Not sharing any presence. Appearing as offline.

telemetry.event.p2p_connection.description: This event helps us understand the reliability and performance of peer-to-peer connections between players. It records whether the connection was successful, the type of Interactive Connectivity Establishment (ICE, the protocol we use to establish peer-to-peer connections) candidate used, and how long it took to establish the connection.

values.previous: Which graphics API to use for rendering. Leave as Default unless you have a specific need to change this! Will take affect the next time you start the game.
values.current: Which graphics API to use for rendering. Leave as Default unless you have a specific need to change this!

values.previous: Option will be applied after restart.
values.current: Requires a game restart to take effect.
